input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Documentation examples often use YAML/JSON/HOCON/TOML files, but those require optional Hoplite format modules. For core-only coverage, tests should use built-in Java properties, MapPropertySource, system/environment property sources, decoders, preprocessors, and ConfigLoader APIs instead of adding an optional parser module unless a specific test deliberately targets that integration.
Version 3.0.0.RC1 moves Hoplite core to Kotlin 2.1.0 transitive artifacts; local Gradle compilation remains authoritative for whether the existing test scaffold Kotlin toolchain is compatible.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Hoplite core can be meaningfully exercised with its built-in APIs and transitive dependencies; no extra Maven module, Docker service, environment variable, or system property is required.
